tasks.evidence: Opening the app and tapping the camera CTA reached the capture screen with upload, photo, barcode, and manual-input options.
sample-01 produced a report with a visible purchase recommendation, product identity, source/confidence, and evidence sections.
sample-04 produced an explicit insufficient-information report: no purchase conclusion, missing label parts, and next-step retake guidance.
Invalid text-file upload produced a generic information-insufficient report instead of an explicit unsupported-file error; a subsequent valid sample still reached a normal report.
sample-02 then sample-01 reached a comparison page with A/B product cards and aligned sugar, carb, sodium, allergen, and additive differences.
Home quick attention chips allowed switching from default to sugar/allergy-oriented attention states without assistance.
A report exposed save and avoid actions, and returning home preserved visible saved/avoid status.
Report/comparison pages explicitly explain value beyond generic AI: packaging evidence, profile-aware ordering, A/B alignment, and checkable sources.

trustSignals.notes: Strong packaging-specific decision support: clear buy/caution framing, insufficient-info refusal, evidence/provenance, and A/B comparison. Main weakness observed was weak explicit invalid-format feedback for unsupported uploads.

issues.title: Invalid upload feedback is not explicit enough
issues.evidence: The invalid text-file upload was treated as an information-insufficient label result, but no clear unsupported-file or invalid-format error was captured before recovery.
issues.suggestedDirection: Reject unsupported file types immediately and keep a visible retry/upload-another control beside the error.

observations.name: after-allergy-switch
observations.text:
我的
关注目标
可多选，购买建议会按这些目标排序。
日常综合
默认看添加剂、糖、钠、脂肪和过敏原。
已选
控糖
重点看糖、糖浆、甜味剂和碳水。
减脂
重点看热量、脂肪、糖和碳水。
低钠/少盐
重点看钠、盐和含钠配料。
儿童零食
把甜味剂、色素、咖啡因、高糖高钠放前面。
购买建议会优先提示：糖、甜味剂和碳水数字。
回到拍摄页，下一次识别会使用当前画像。
保存并继续拍摄
过敏 / 忌口
先选具体过敏原；命中后会优先阻断购买建议。

替代推荐
先确认
如果你或家人过敏，先找无对应致敏提示的同类，再比较糖、钠和添加剂。
控糖筛选
先找糖≤5g/100ml（固体≤8g/100g）、碳水≤8g/100ml，且白砂糖/糖浆不在配料前三位。
再拍一款
拍第二款同类后，会直接比较糖、碳水、甜味剂和糖浆位置，给出更适合控糖的一款。
